pairs.py:
def max_reachable(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Return the maximum node value reachable from start."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]; start = spec["start"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; best = None
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n)
        if best is None or vals[n] > best: best = vals[n]
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))
    return best

def count_above(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Count reachable nodes whose value exceeds the threshold."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]; start = spec["start"]; k = spec["threshold"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; acc = 0
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n); v = vals[n]
        if v > k: acc += 1
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))
    return acc

def max_edge_weight(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Return the maximum edge weight reachable (0 if none)."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; start = spec["start"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; acc = 0
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n)
        for tgt, w in adj.get(n, []):
            acc = w if w > acc else acc
            stack.append(tgt)
    return acc

def alternating_chain_sum(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Add and subtract the chain values with alternating sign."""
    nums = spec["nums"]
    total = 0
    sign = 1
    for n in nums:
        total += sign * n
        sign = -sign
    return total

def budget_walk_labels(spec: dict) -> list:
    """Visit chain stops in order, collecting labels while total cost stays within budget."""
    stops = spec["stops"]
    budget = spec["budget"]
    spent = 0
    names = []
    for label, cost in stops:
        if spent + cost > budget:
            break
        spent += cost
        names.append(label)
    return names

def top_k_harvest(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Sum of the k largest chain values, claimed one round at a time."""
    nums = spec["nums"]
    total = 0
    rounds = 0
    taken = [False] * len(nums)
    while rounds < spec["k"]:
        best = -1
        for i in range(len(nums)):
            if not taken[i] and (best == -1 or nums[i] > nums[best]):
                best = i
        if best == -1:
            break
        taken[best] = True
        total += nums[best]
        rounds += 1
    return total
